review_questions: Does the audit correctly identify every truth-conditioned runtime path?
Are any truth-conditioned paths missed because they use different wording?
Does the run funnel distinguish invalid traces, complete traces, and included public evidence cleanly enough?
Is the blind-gate replication spec strict enough to prevent reward hacking?
What no-provider fixtures should be added before any live blind-gate canary?
Does the updated spec faithfully incorporate T1-T7 from the disconfirmation battery?
